headline: Stronger Grid Ahead: Power Line Rebuild to Boost Reliability in Northwest Ohio
summary: American Transmission Systems, Inc. (ATSI), a FirstEnergy Transmission company, is rebuilding about 11 miles of a high-voltage power line in eastern Williams County. The West Unity (Stryker) 69-kV Line Rebuild Project includes replacing aging equipment with stronger structures and updated technology to reduce outage risks for Toledo Edison customers in and around West Unity.

headline: 4 Utility Industry Stocks to Add as Power Demand Continues to Increase
summary: Amid rising electricity demand and higher unit prices, utilities like FE, NI, NWE and OTTR are well-positioned to benefit, supported by their strong customer base and well-chalked capital expenditure plans.

headline: FirstEnergy (FE) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
summary: FirstEnergy (FE) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Jefferies Maintains Hold on FirstEnergy, Raises Price Target to $52
summary: Jefferies  analyst Julien Dumoulin-Smith   maintains FirstEnergy (NYSE:FE) with a Hold and raises the price target from $50 to $52.
